bigin-harness-setup.summary: Scaffolds an AI workflow harness into a repo — CLAUDE.md, path-scoped rules, and enforcement gates. Profiles: nuxt, go, nodejs, next.

task-workflow.summary: On-demand task workflow (/task-workflow): scope → spec → plan (approved) → implement/verify loop (capped, independent verifier) → review → cleanup.

nuxt-scaffold.summary: Scaffolds a Nuxt 4 BFF app from scratch via a deterministic Node.js script — npm create nuxt@latest + BFF preset + config/sample code. No GitHub clone.

next-scaffold.summary: Scaffolds a Next.js App Router BFF app from scratch via a deterministic Node.js script — create-next-app + BFF preset + shadcn/ui. No GitHub clone.

go-scaffold.summary: Scaffolds a production-ready Go REST API — contract-first (oapi-codegen + sqlc), chi router, Postgres. Runs codegen + build/vet/test itself.

nodejs-scaffold.summary: Scaffolds a production-ready Node.js REST API — contract-first (openapi-typescript + Drizzle), Fastify, Postgres. Runs codegen + lint/typecheck/test itself.

sprint-distill.summary: End-of-sprint distillation: merged PRs + touched knowledge/ concepts → proposal-first knowledge/ and bigin-skills updates. Compresses, never just appends.

write-tests.summary: On-demand test authoring (/write-tests): style-matches the nearest test file, lists edge cases first, TDD-orders logic, mocks only true I/O boundaries.

debug-workflow.summary: On-demand systematic debugging (/debug-workflow): triage → fast path for obvious bugs, full guarded workflow for flaky/env/repeat-failure bugs.

model-router.summary: Scores task complexity via a deterministic rubric and routes to quick-executor/standard-worker/deep-architect. Routes down as well as up.

session-handoff.summary: Saves session state (tasks, decisions, uncommitted changes) to SESSION.md and restores it on resume.

nuxt-ui-figma-handoff.summary: Turns a Nuxt UI Figma design handoff into code — theme tokens into main.css, component overrides into app.config.ts. Requires a Figma URL.

quick-executor.summary: mechanical, single-file, low-risk tasks. Routed by `model-router`.

standard-worker.summary: default tier, most feature/bug-fix work. Routed by `model-router`.

deep-architect.summary: architectural decisions, contract/schema changes, full-spec tier. Routed by `model-router`.

verifier.summary: read-only — audits a diff against `PLAN.md` independently of the implementer's own summary. Spawned fresh each round, alongside whichever tier implemented.
